author: lecriste
body:
#### PR description:

This PR introduces an associator between SimClusters and TICL Tracksters. Among other usages, it will be used for HGCAL validation in place of the MultiCluster. No changes are expected in the output.

#### PR validation:

`runTheMatrix -l limited`
title: [HGCAL] Tracksters to SimClusters associator
